ui.shell.placeholder.caption: Section scaffold only
ui.shell.placeholder.hint: This section is waiting for a later implementation step
ui.astrology.workspace.hint: Foundation astrology workspace using temporary sample data and the isolated chart pipeline
ui.astrology.panel.chart.title: Chart
ui.astrology.panel.chart.description: The current chart surface uses a deterministic sample scene until real input and calculation flow exist.
ui.astrology.panel.birth_data.title: Birth data
ui.astrology.panel.birth_data.descriptio: This area now hosts the first structured birth-data input flow for the offline/manual mode before real chart recalculation is connected.
ui.astrology.panel.interpretation.title: Context and interpretation
ui.astrology.panel.interpretation.descri: This area will host contextual panels and structured interpretation blocks after input and calculation are introduced.
ui.birth_data.birth_city_or_settlement_h: A full street address is not required. City or settlement plus country or region is enough. Coordinates and timezone are required for calculation.
ui.birth_data.validation.valid: Basic validation passed. Real chart calculation is not connected yet.
ui.birth_data.unknown_time_helper: When the birth time is unknown, the time field may stay empty. A neutral internal fallback of 12:00 will be used later for technical calculations without changing the UnknownTime status.
ui.birth_data.validation.time_required: A time value is required for exact or approximate accuracy.
ui.birth_data.validation.latitude_invali: Latitude must be a number in the range -90 to 90.
ui.birth_data.validation.longitude_inval: Longitude must be a number in the range -180 to 180.
ui.birth_data.validation.timezone_invali: Select a valid timezone ID from the TZDB list.
ui.settings.title: Settings
ui.settings.hint: Changes currently apply in memory only
